name: Thu... Sukuna, the strongest of TODAY (swap au)
description:
꓄ꁝ꒤ꀘ꒤ꋊꋬ

Swap AU. Sukuna is the strongest sorcerer of today. Working as teacher in Tokyo Jujutsu high. Just an old man who is tired of everything, finding relax in turning off his brains and doom scrolling through Tik-Tok.

1st message: encounter in the midnight school

2nd message: in the Jujutsu high he is showing silly fan art of himself.

November update: added info about swap URAUME, they replacing Shoko here.
creator: Sisinasisu
